prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young girl with {argument name="hair color" default="silver"} hair styled in long twin tails secured with black ribbons, and {argument name="eye color" default="pink"} eyes. She has a {argument name="expression" default="smug smile with a slight blush"} and is looking directly at the viewer. She is posing dynamically, leaning forward slightly with one hand making a peace sign near her cheek and the other hand resting on her hip. She is wearing a white long-sleeved blouse featuring ruffles down the center and at the cuffs, a black ribbon tied at the collar, and a black high-waisted skirt with a ruffled hem and corset-style lacing. The background is a solid {argument name="background color" default="vibrant pink"} with a subtle vignette effect. The art style is high-quality, detailed anime illustration with soft lighting and glossy hair highlights.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的少女插画，拥有 {argument name="hair color" default="银色"} 的双马尾长发，并用黑色丝带扎起，配有 {argument name="eye color" default="粉色"} 的双眼。她带着 {argument name="expression" default="略带红晕的俏皮微笑"}，直视着观众。她姿态生动，身体微微前倾，一只手在脸颊旁比出剪刀手，另一只手叉在腰间。她身穿白色长袖衬衫，领口和袖口饰有荷叶边，领口系着黑色丝带，下身穿着黑色高腰裙，裙摆带有荷叶边和束腰式系带设计。背景为纯色 {argument name="background color" default="亮粉色"}，并带有微妙的晕影效果。艺术风格为高质量、细节丰富的动漫插画，光影柔和，发丝光泽感十足。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫少女俏皮剪刀手肖像：生成一张动漫风格的少女剪刀手肖像，发色、眼色及背景颜色均可自定义。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: soft light]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
